lines.english: With my feet, I walk on the Path of my Lord and Master. ||1||
It is a good time, when I remember Him in meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਭੈ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਰੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: simarat naam bhai paar utareea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, I cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||Pause||
Record the Immortal Lord God within your mind. ||2||
Listen to the Kirtan of His Praises, at the Feet of the Holy.
With your eyes, behold the Blessed Vision of the Saints.
Your fears of birth and death shall depart. ||3||
Thus this human life, so difficult to obtain, shall be redeemed. ||4||51||120||
Enshrine the Lotus Feet of your Lord and Master within your heart.
chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, with their tongues. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Those, upon whom the Lord Himself showers His Mercy,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਭਾਗੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: simarat naam bharam bhau bhaagai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, doubt and fear shall depart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਸੁਣੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har keeratan sunai har keeratan gaavai |
lines.english: Listening to the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, and singing the Lord's Kirtan,
Forgetting the Lord, superstition and sorrow shall overtake you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਦੂਖੁ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨਹੀ ਆਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tis jan dookh nikatt nahee aavai |2|
lines.english: misfortune shall not even come near you. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਟਹਲ ਕਰਤ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: har kee ttehal karat jan sohai |
lines.english: Working for the Lord, His humble servants look beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਉ ਮਾਇਆ ਅਗਨਿ ਨ ਪੋਹੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taa kau maaeaa agan na pohai |3|
lines.english: The fire of Maya does not touch them. ||3||
Nanak has renounced other entanglements. ||4||52||121||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਇਆਲ ॥
lines.translit: man tan mukh har naam deaal |
lines.english: Within their minds, bodies and mouths, is the Name of the Merciful Lord.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Renounce your cleverness, and your cunning tricks.
Seek the Support of the Perfect Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa bhettiaa liv laae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meeting the Perfect Guru, let yourself be absorbed in the Lord's Love. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸੁਖ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh binase sukh har gun gaae |
lines.english: Your pain shall depart, and in peace, you shall sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਓ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam deeo gur mantru |
lines.english: The Guru has given me the Mantra of the Name of the Lord.
Meeting with the Merciful Guru, I am in ecstasy.
Showering His Mercy, He has cut away the noose of the Messenger of Death. ||3||
My worries are forgotten, and my anxiety is gone. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਮਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੫੩॥੧੨੨॥
lines.translit: taa te bahur na biaapai maaeaa |4|53|122|
lines.english: Maya shall no longer harass me. ||4||53||122||
Says Nanak, I have found the Perfect Guru;
Chant and meditate on the Guru, the Guru, O my friend.
The Perfect Guru Himself has saved me.
The self-willed manmukhs are afflicted with misfortune. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Your face shall be radiant in the Court of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
your pains, enemies and bad luck shall be destroyed. ||2||
Enshrine the Feet of the Guru within your heart;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਤੇਰੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad terai sang sahaaee |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is your Companion and Helper.
When the Perfect Guru granted His Grace,
O Siblings of Destiny, all beings shall be kind to you. ||3||
says Nanak, I was totally, completely fulfilled. ||4||54||123||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Like beasts, they consume all sorts of tasty treats.
Their bodies are corpses, without the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਤ ਜਾਤ ਜੋਨੀ ਦੁਖ ਖੀਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aavat jaat jonee dukh kheenaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They come and go in reincarnation, and are destroyed by pain. ||1||Pause||
With the rope of emotional attachment, they are bound and gagged like thieves. ||1||
They wear all sorts of beautiful robes,
but they are still just scarecrows in the field, frightening away the birds. ||2||
All bodies are of some use,
but those who do not meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, are totally useless. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਭਏ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jaa kau bhe deaalaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, those unto whom the Lord becomes Merciful,
join the Saadh Sangat, and meditate on the Lord of the Universe. ||4||55||124||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
